seoTitle: Essendon Fields vs Essendon West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Essendon Fields and Essendon West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Essendon Fields vs Essendon West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Essendon Fields and Essendon West.
heading: Essendon Fields vs Essendon West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Essendon Fields, Victoria and Essendon West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Essendon Fields has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Essendon West (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Essendon Fields or Essendon West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Essendon Fields has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Essendon West scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Essendon Fields scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Essendon West scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Essendon Fields or Essendon West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Essendon Fields has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
